attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"trajectory": {"thought_0": "I need to find out more about Amanda Crew's role in the movie \"Sex Drive.\" This information is likely available on Wikipedia, so I will search for it there.", "tool_name_0": "search_wikipedia", "tool_args_0": {"query": "Amanda Crew role in Sex Drive"}, "observation_0": ["Amanda Crew | Amanda Catherine Crew (born June 5, 1986) is a Canadian actress. She is best known for portraying Monica Hall on the HBO sitcom \"Silicon Valley\" (2014–present). Following her film debut in \"Final Destination 3\" (2006), she had lead roles as Felicia Alpine in \"Sex Drive\" (2008) and Tess Carroll in \"Charlie St. Cloud\" (2010), as well as Carrie Miller on the television series \"Whistler\".", "Sex Drive (film) | Sex Drive is a 2008 sex comedy film about a high school graduate who goes on a road trip to have sex with a girl he met online. It is based on the young adult novel \"All the Way\" by American author Andy Behrens. The film was directed by Sean Anders, and stars Josh Zuckerman, Amanda Crew, Clark Duke, Seth Green, and James Marsden, while Katrina Bowden, Alice Greczyn, Michael Cudlitz, Dave Sheridan, and David Koechner appear in supporting roles. It was released in North America on October 17, 2008, and in the United Kingdom on January 9, 2009.", "Alice Greczyn | Alice Hannah Meiqui Greczyn (born February 6, 1986) is an American actress and model best known for roles in the films \"The Dukes of Hazzard\", \"Shrooms\", \"House of Fears\" and \"Sex Drive\". She is also well known as Sage Lund in \"Lincoln Heights\", and as Madeline \"Mads\" Rybak in \"The Lying Game\"."], "thought_1": "I found that Amanda Crew played the role of Felicia Alpine in the movie \"Sex Drive.\" This information is sufficient to answer the question.", "tool_name_1": "finish", "tool_args_1": {}, "observation_1": "Completed."}, "reasoning": "Amanda Crew played the role of Felicia Alpine in the movie \"Sex Drive.\" This information was confirmed through a search that provided details about her character in the film.", "answer": "Amanda Crew's role in the movie \"Sex Drive\" is Felicia Alpine."}
